---
title: "OLADE Data Download"
format: html
---

# OLADE Energy Data Download Instructions

Navigate to the [OLADE website](SIE) and create an account and log in to access all years of energy data. There are six different Excel files to download to build the energy indicators in CEPALSTAT.

## Total energy production

**Data source:** [OLADE supply and demand series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteOD.aspx?subsectorId=0&or=720&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Information unit

-   Columns: Energy source

-   Units: J

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Activity: Production

-   Energy sources: -

Download excel and save as "energy_production_raw.xlsx".

## Total energy supply

**Data source:** [OLADE supply and demand series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteOD.aspx?subsectorId=0&or=720&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Information unit

-   Columns: Energy source

-   Units: J

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Activity: TOTAL SUPPLY

-   Energy sources: -

Download excel and save as "energy_supply_raw.xlsx".

## Total final consumption

**Data source:** [OLADE supply and demand series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteOD.aspx?subsectorId=0&or=720&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Information unit

-   Columns: Energy source

-   Units: J

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Activity: FINAL CONSUMPTION

-   Energy sources: -

Download excel and save as "energy_consumption_raw.xlsx".

## Final consumption by sector

**Data source:** [OLADE supply and demand series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteOD.aspx?subsectorId=0&or=720&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Information unit

-   Columns: Activity

-   Units: J

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Activity: Transport; Industrial; Residential; Commercial, services, public; Agriculture, fishing, mining; Construction and others

-   Energy sources: Total

Download excel and save as "energy_consumption_sector_raw.xlsx".

## Electricity losses

**Data source:** [OLADE supply and demand series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteOD.aspx?subsectorId=0&or=720&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Information unit

-   Columns: Energy source

-   Units: Unit origin (GWh)

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Activity: Losses

-   Energy sources: Electricity

Download excel and save as "electricity_losses_raw.xlsx".

## Electricity infrastructure

**Data source:** [OLADE electricity infrastructure series](https://sielac.olacde.org/WebForms/Reportes/ReporteDato7.aspx?oc=181&or=392&ss=2&v=1)

**Report:**

-   Rows: Classifier

-   Columns: Information unit

-   Units: Unit origin (MW)

**Filters:**

-   Information unit: -

-   Time: -

-   Energy sources: Electricity

-   Classifier: Nuclear; Non-renewable thermal (combustion); Renewable thermal (combustion); Hydro, Geothermal, Wind, Solar (the last four are inside of Renewable sources, no combustion)

-   Variable: Installed capacity

Download excel and save as "electricity_infra_raw.xlsx".
